$id.description: Unique identifier using JMdict entry sequence (vocab:{ent_seq})

japanese.description: Written form (kanji/kana mix as typically written), NFKC_PLUS normalized

meanings.description: Primary English meanings (from first JMdict sense)

secondaryMeanings.description: Additional English meanings (from remaining JMdict senses)

category.description: Part of speech (e.g. noun, ichidan verb, i-adjective)

audioAssetId.description: Reference to pronunciation audio in R2
